$comment: Single source of truth for the Fumadocs Helper extension. Each entry drives the insert palette, autocomplete, hover docs, and validation. The component list must match what is registered in your Fumadocs app's getMDXComponents (apps/docs-*/src/components/mdx.tsx).

components.name: Callout
components.label: Callout — info / warning box
components.description: A highlighted box for tips, warnings, notes, or errors. Great for drawing attention to important information.

props.name: title
props.description: Bold heading shown at the top of the box.

components.name: Cards
components.label: Cards — grid of link cards
components.description: A responsive grid container that holds multiple Card components.
components.snippet:
<Cards>
  <Card title="${1:First card}" href="${2:/some-page}" />
  <Card title="${3:Second card}" href="${4:/another-page}" />
</Cards>

components.name: Card
components.label: Card — single clickable card
components.description: A clickable card with a title, optional description, and link. Usually placed inside <Cards>.

props.name: description
props.description: Optional supporting text under the title.

props.name: href
props.description: Where the card links to (a URL or /path).

props.name: external
props.description: Open the link in a new tab.

components.name: Tabs
components.label: Tabs — tabbed content
components.description: Show several pieces of content in switchable tabs. Each tab is a <Tab> with a matching value.
components.snippet:
<Tabs items={['${1:npm}', '${2:pnpm}']}>
  <Tab value="${1:npm}">
    ${3:First tab content.}
  </Tab>
  <Tab value="${2:pnpm}">
    ${4:Second tab content.}
  </Tab>
</Tabs>

components.name: Tab
components.label: Tab — one tab panel
components.description: A single tab panel inside <Tabs>. Its value must match an entry in the Tabs items array.

props.name: value
props.description: Must match a label in the parent Tabs items array.

components.name: Steps
components.label: Steps — numbered steps
components.description: A numbered list of steps for tutorials or guides. Each step is a <Step>.
components.snippet:
<Steps>
  <Step>
    ### ${1:First step}
    ${2:What to do.}
  </Step>
  <Step>
    ### ${3:Second step}
    ${4:What to do next.}
  </Step>
</Steps>

components.name: Step
components.label: Step — one step
components.description: A single step inside <Steps>. Add a heading and content inside.

components.name: Accordions
components.label: Accordions — collapsible group
components.description: A group of collapsible sections (FAQ style). Each section is an <Accordion>.

props.name: type
props.description: Whether one or many sections can be open at once.

components.name: Files
components.label: Files — file tree
components.description: Render a file/folder tree to illustrate project structure.

components.name: Folder
components.label: Folder — folder in a file tree
components.description: A folder node inside <Files>. Can contain Files and other Folders.

components.name: File
components.label: File — file in a file tree

components.name: TypeTable
components.label: TypeTable — props / options table
components.description: A nicely formatted table describing properties or options, with types and defaults.
components.snippet:
<TypeTable
  type={{
    ${1:propName}: {
      description: '${2:What it does}',
      type: '${3:string}',
      default: '${4:}',
    },
  }}
/>

components.name: Banner
components.label: Banner — top-of-page banner
components.description: A full-width announcement banner, typically placed at the very top of a page.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique id so it can be dismissed and remembered.

components.name: ImageZoom
components.label: ImageZoom — zoomable image
components.description: An image that can be clicked to zoom in.

components.name: InlineTOC
components.label: InlineTOC — inline table of contents
components.description: An inline table of contents that lists the headings of the page or a section.
